data.title: U.S. Government Considers Acquiring 10% Stake in Intel
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced plans to acquire a 10% stake in Intel through a transaction. He described the deal as excellent and indicated that similar agreements might follow.

Additionally, sources revealed that the U.S. government does not intend to join Intel's board of directors or play a significant role in the company's governance.

data.title: EU Pushes Digital Euro Plans Amid US Stablecoin Law, Weighs Public Blockchain Options
data.description:
European policymakers are intensifying efforts to advance a digital euro after the United States approved sweeping legislation regulating the fast-growing stablecoin sector.

data.title: Ethereum Trader Sees Significant Gains Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, recent on-chain data reveals that a trader known as 'Machi Big Brother' has achieved a floating profit exceeding $4.7 million on Ethereum long positions. Previously, these positions had experienced a floating loss of over $10 million.

Additionally, the trader's HYPE long position has a floating profit of $250,000, while the YZY long position is currently facing a floating loss of $400,000.

data.title: Philippines Proposes Massive 10,000 Bitcoin Buy for Strategic Reserve
data.description:
The Philippines Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act mandates annual Bitcoin acquisitions by the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas to build a 10,000 BTC reserve locked for two decades.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/philippines-proposes-massive-10000-bitcoin-buy-for-strategic-reserve/

data.title: Ethereum Surges to Highest Level Since 2021
data.description: According to Foresight News, Ethereum has surpassed the 4,800 USDT mark, currently trading at 4,802.96 USDT. This marks a daily increase of 13.67%, reaching its highest value since November 2021.

data.title: Shiba Inu Reveals LEASH v2 Token Design: Simple, Secure, Auditable
data.description:
In Brief Shiba Inu’s lead developer has unveiled the technical blueprint for the long-awaited LEASH v2 token—a redesign that strips complexity back to its core, eliminates minting risks, and hands final supply control to the DAO, directly addressing the concerns that arose from the v1 token’s rebase mechanism. A ‘No Mint’ Migrator The cornerstone of the new system’s security is its migrator contract. To eliminate any possibility of unauthorized token creation, the contract will not have a minting function.   “The migrator will not have any power to mint tokens,” Dhairya explained
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/08/22/shiba-inu-reveals-leash-v2-token-design-simple-secure-auditable/

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 4,800 USDT with a 14.16% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Aug 22, 2025, 17:14 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 4,800 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 4,810.350098 USDT, with a narrowed 14.16% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin Whales Quietly Stack 16,000 BTC During Downtrend
data.description:
Reports from CryptoQuant suggest that large holders are moving aggressively while smaller players are bailing out. Related Reading: Bitcoin’s Next Stop For 2025? $175,000, According To SOL Strategies Boss Over the past week, wallets linked to key Bitcoin participants grabbed more than 16,000 BTC during a price decline. At the same time, retail investors have been selling into weakness, taking losses and widening the gap between whales and small traders. Analysts see this as a possible clue that the market could be forming a local bottom
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin-whales-quietly-stack-16000-btc-during-downtrend/

data.title: SharpLink board authorizes $1.5 billion stock repurchase against Ethereum
data.description:
SharpLink Gaming, Inc. , one of the largest corporate holders of Ether and a renowned industry ETH evangelist, has announced that its Board of Directors has authorized a stock repurchase program of up to $1. 5 billion of the company’s common stock. According to Sharplink, buybacks will be more value-accretive when the share price trades below its […]

data.title: A Wake-Up Call for the UK: Why It’s Falling Behind in the Global Bitcoin Race
data.description:
While the UK government has expressed a desire to be a global hub for digital assets, reality tells a different story. The British crypto community is sounding the alarm, arguing that the country is falling behind in the global Bitcoin race. Experts from crypto organizations across the UK told BeInCrypto that the country’s cautious approach stifles innovation and drives businesses offshore. This continued environment will evaporate any competitive advantage the UK used to have in financial innovation
source: https://beincrypto.com/uk-falling-behind-global-bitcoin-race/
